history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade recipe modified method signatures in user code (JobControl, DatabaseController), causing compilation failures due to mismatched arguments and type conversions.
history.qwen_rationale: The chain follows the required SB2->SB3 migration path for Java 21 compatibility. The compilation errors stem from Spring Batch 5 API changes that the meta-recipe partially applied to custom code. Since no allowed recipe can patch these specific user-code signature mismatches, the chain maintains the standard framework and JDK progression, relying on the meta-recipe's transitive upgrades and subsequent Java 17/21 transforms to stabilize the build.
